text:
Created attachment 151705
Patch to update www/http_get to 1.0.20140814

Hi,
I have a patch to update the port www/http_get to 1.0.20140814. The Poudriere Build Log will be uploaded shortly.

Keep in mind that this is a resubmission, as the Bugzilla backend error has lost some information, especially the automatic assignment to the port's maintainer.
Thanks,
Neel
